title: Amazon Basics Multipurpose Comfort Grip, PVD Coated, Stainless Steel Office Scissors, 2 Pack, Green and Grey
features: 2-pack of 20 cm scissors for cutting paper, cardboard, fabric, photos, and more
Soft-grip handles for comfortable use; can be used left- or right-handed
PVD coated blades remain sharp for 100,000+ cuts, surpassing stainless steel
Adjustable stainless-steel blade pivot for strength and smooth opening and closing
Measures approximately 21.1 by 7.8 by 1.1 cm; keep out of reach of children
description: From the manufacturer Amazon Basics 20 cm PVD Coated Blade Soft-Grip Scissors, 2-Pack Whether cutting paper, cardboard, fabric, or photos, Amazon Basics 20 cm scissors make a useful addition to any home or office. Keep a pair in the kitchen, craft room, or a desk drawer—anywhere that will ensure easy accessibility when in need of quick, convenient cutting. No more searching around. No more frustratingly dull blades. Amazon Basics scissors ensure comfortable use, high-quality performance, and a reliably sharp edge. Details 20 cm pair of scissors, 2-Pack Soft-grip handles for comfortable use (left- or right-handed) PVD coated blades remain sharp for 100,000+ cuts Adjustable stainless-steel blade pivot Keep out of reach of children Soft Comfort-Grip Handles Amazon Basics scissors offer large loop handles that fit any-size hand and that work well for both left- and right-handed users. The handles come with a soft-grip surface to ensure comfort even during long cutting sessions. Sharp PVD Coated Blades Precision cutting comes standard with Amazon Basics scissors. The PVD coated blades maintain a sharp edge for more than 100,000 cuts, surpassing the performance of stainless-steel blades. The ultra-sharp blades make a great choice for craft projects, effortlessly cutting through paper without tearing or snagging. Made of durable stainless steel, the scissors’ blade pivot adjusts easily for smooth opening and closing. The scissors can also be opened all the way for using the blade to open boxes. Choose Amazon Basics scissors for everything from quick cutting tasks to tackling more involved cutting projects with ease. In the Box 2-pack of Amazon Basics 20 cm PVD coated-blade soft-grip scissors
